modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access important links and services in various browsers.

full_description_text: I’m trying to submit my final grades for my course but I can’t find the Final Grade link in SNAP. Also, I keep getting a McAfee pop up and D2L won’t open in Chrome, it just shows an error. I also have issues logging into usd.myprintdesk.net, it says the header field is too long. Slido isn’t loading when I try to create an account through Webex.
short_description: Unable to access important links and services in various browsers.
description: I’m trying to submit my final grades for my course but I can’t find the Final Grade link in SNAP. Also, I keep getting a McAfee pop up and D2L won’t open in Chrome, it just shows an error. I also have issues logging into usd.myprintdesk.net, it says the header field is too long. Slido isn’t loading when I try to create an account through Webex.
